prompt_template:
use the following URL for all logo URLs: https://www.astound.com/wp-content/themes/astound/images/logos/logo-astound-vertical.png and Use the provided markdown below and generate schema for each and every URL, by first identify any rich results and schema.org types applicable to the content and generate a complete and valid JSON-LD schema markup for me to insert into the webpage and help with search indexing, and adding as much context to the content as possible. Be sure to include FAQ schema, special offers, and pre-fill as much as possible from the markdown file but if any placeholders are inserted then call that out in the response under the code. Do not use product schema markup without adding aggregate and individual reviews for the product and if relevant to the page. Analyze the following webpage content below and generate comprehensive, advanced JSON-LD structured data (Schema.org markup) for it. Include all relevant schema types, properties, and nested entities. Output ONLY valid JSON-LD wrapped in <script type="application/ld+json"> tags.

Webpage Content:
[PAGE_MARKDOWN]


Use the provided URL or an attached markdown file of a webpage to identify any rich results and schema.org types applicable to the content and generate a complete and valid JSON-LD schema markup for me to insert into the webpage and help with search indexing, and adding as much context to the content as possible. Be sure to include FAQ schema, offers, offercatalog, and pre-fill as much as possible from the markdown file but if any placeholders are inserted then call that out in the response under the code generated.
url_prompt_template:
You will be given a webpage URL. Analyze the page content and generate comprehensive, advanced JSON-LD structured data (Schema.org markup) for the page. Identify all applicable rich results and schema.org types. Include FAQ schema, special offers, and aggregate reviews where relevant. Do not markup products, only markup services, and output JSON-LD but validate it first before sending back to user; and ensure it is wrapped in <script type="application/ld+json"> tags, followed by a brief note of any placeholders needing to be replaced.

Page URL: [PAGE_URL]
identify_prompt_template:
You will be given a URL. Crawl the page and identify ALL applicable Schema.org types and Google Rich Results types that should be implemented on this page. Do NOT write any schema markup code.

For each applicable type, provide:
1. The Schema.org type name (e.g. Article, FAQPage, LocalBusiness, Product, BreadcrumbList, etc.)
2. A brief one-line reason why it applies to this page content

Format your response as a simple numbered list. Be thorough and include every relevant type.

Page URL: [PAGE_URL]
